title: urginea maritima var. numidica
intro: Urginea maritima var. numidica, also known as the Numidian squill, is a variety of the Urginea maritima plant, a perennial bulbous geophyte native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Urginea maritima var. numidica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, as well as its use in traditional medicine to stimulate digestion and improve circulation. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or orally, depending on the desired effect.
